personal.name: Jaikeerthi
personal.title: AI & ML Engineer | Full Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building intelligent AI systems, scalable web applications, and next-generation automation platforms.

about.heading: Driven by innovation and problem-solving
paragraphs: I am a passionate AI & Machine Learning Engineer and Full Stack Developer specializing in Generative AI, AI Agents, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, Data Analytics, Web Development, Embedded Systems, and IoT technologies. I focus on creating innovative, scalable, and intelligent solutions that solve real-world problems.

Driven by innovation and problem-solving, I specialize in developing AI-powered systems, automation platforms, and modern web applications. My expertise includes Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, Agentic AI systems, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Analytics, and Full Stack Development. I am passionate about building intelligent technologies that improve efficiency, automation, and digital transformation.

items.title: Founder
description: Founder of REDDOT, a technology-focused company specializing in AI Agents, Intelligent Automation, Generative AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, Data Analytics, Web Development, Embedded Systems, IoT Solutions, and Internship Programs.
Focused on delivering innovative AI-driven solutions and next-generation technology services.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Currently working as a Full Stack Developer at V4Sure IT Solutions, contributing to scalable web applications, backend systems, AI integrations, intelligent automation solutions, and responsive user interfaces.

items.title: Mr India Bodybuilding Competition
description: Secured Third Place in the Junior Category at the Mr India Bodybuilding Competition.

items.title: International Chess Player
description: International Chess Rated Player with an official chess rating of 1440.

items.title: Fake Review Detection
items.description: Developed an AI-powered machine learning system capable of detecting fake and spam reviews using natural language processing and predictive analytics.

items.title: Jarvis AI
items.description: Built an advanced AI assistant integrating automation workflows, intelligent response systems, memory architecture, and smart task execution capabilities.

items.title: Web Scraper Agent
items.description: Created an intelligent automated web scraping agent for extracting, processing, and analyzing structured and unstructured web data efficiently.

items.title: Customized LLM
items.description: Developed customized large language model solutions optimized for domain-specific applications, automation systems, and intelligent AI workflows.

items.title: Commodity Forecasting Platform
items.description: Designed a deep learning-based commodity forecasting platform focused on market volatility analysis, predictive intelligence, and financial trend forecasting.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Interested in collaborating on AI systems, intelligent automation, machine learning solutions, or full stack development projects? Let's connect and build innovative technology solutions together.
